message:
✨ Enhance Queue and Activity tabs with issue info and triage status (#1207)

- Fix untriaged condition to cover both 'open' and 'needs_triage' statuses
  (was only matching 'needs_triage', missing newly submitted 'open' items)
- Activity tab notifications now show: issue number, GitHub link (from
  linked request), "Waiting for triage" message, and "Request Update" button
- User's own untriaged Queue items show title, GitHub link, and triage message

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
